faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Bensonhurst typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my Bensonhurst home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common household ants (typically 1/4 to 1/2 inch long) and are usually black or dark brown. Key signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants especially during evening hours. Unlike termites, carpenter ants don't eat wood but excavate it to build nests, leaving behind smooth tunnels and galleries.
